name: VOSS
description: The VOSS source sits in Iveland, a sparsely populated area on the southern tip of Norway. Confined in an aquifer deep beneath the earth, VOSS water lies under layers of rock and sand, which create a natural filter, protecting it from the air and other pollutants. The exceptional purity of VOSS, and its uniquely fresh, clean taste, are due in part to the unusually low levels of Total Dissolved Solids (TDS) naturally occurring in the VOSS source.

name: Actio
description: actio was founded in 2019 by Nikita Fahrenholz and Daniel Stahlkopf, who had previously worked on successful projects such as Delivery Hero, Tiger Facility Services and foodspring and are united by their enthusiasm for fitness, mindfulness, and self-optimization. The actio app is based on specially designed VoIP calling software that connects users with real coaches worldwide, bringing them together in group calls. Zoom meets Peloton Interactive.

name: AdScale
description: As Germany’s leading real time market place for online advertising, AdScale brings advertisers and website providers (publishers) together and pinpoints advertising in Internet making it more effective. In doing this, the auction system guarantees full transparency and fair prices. In 2013, AdScale was acquired by Ströer Digital Group.

description: Again combines millennial-old bacteria with cutting-edge technology to ferment CO2 into green Acetate, a precursor chemical for huge end markets like plastics, apparel, and pharmaceuticals.

name: Agreena
description: Agreena unlocks the power of soil carbon removals and natural capital to finance the transition to regenerative agriculture. Working closely with partner farmers across 16 European markets and growing, AgreenaCarbon is the world’s leading soil carbon platform. With market-leading satellite monitoring technologies, Agreena’s solutions can support farmers, companies, and governments on the road to net zero.

name: Alasco
description: Alasco develops a web-based tool with which project controllers and developers can trace all costs throughout all construction phases. The company’s software replaces manual processes through digital workflows so that project controllers can, e.g. when it comes to auditing, save themselves time and avoid mistakes. Alasco offers a central source of information for all financial data involved in construction projects – information that building owners can access at any time to get a current overview of costs.

name: alphin
description: alphin is building the operating system for local business marketing. Through alphin, local businesses get the opportunity to showcase their company, products and services to potential customers via different digital services and set their customer lifecycle management on autopilot. alphins mission? To empower local businesses around the world to focus on what they really love - their business. Currently, alphin enables modern marketing for 800+ local businesses in Germany, Austria and the UK. alphin was founded in 2017, is headquartered in Berlin and generates a 7-figure ARR already today.

name: Archlet
description: Archlet is the AI-native eSourcing & eAuctions platform that makes procurement fast, transparent, and enjoyable. We help teams move beyond spreadsheets and outdated tools by automating manual work, centralizing data, and surfacing insights where they matter most. With built-in supplier management, approval workflows, and seamless integrations, Archlet is the one tool for all sourcing needs across direct and indirect categories, simple or complex. Procurement teams at companies like PepsiCo, Walmart, Bosch, and FedEx automate RFPs, run events faster, negotiate smarter, and build stronger supplier relationships. The result is more savings, more impact, and a sourcing experience people actually enjoy. This isn’t just better software. It’s a better way to source.

name: ARX Robotics
description: ARX Robotics develops autonomous unmanned ground systems with scalable hardware components and modular software architectures. Our solutions are designed to meet the evolving demands of defense and commercial applications with precision and adaptability. At the core of ARX is Mithra OS, our AI-powered operating system that bridges legacy platforms with cutting-edge technologies. Mithra enables seamless autonomy, interoperability, and real-time adaptability, providing a scalable solution to robotize legacy systems and support modernization efforts across domains. Complementing this is the Gereon system, a proven platform supporting reconnaissance, logistics, recovery, and crisis response. Together, these technologies empower operators in high-pressure missions with reliable, mission-critical capabilities. Deployed in NATO, EU, and civilian initiatives, ARX delivers scalable, dual-use systems that enhance operational resilience and decision-making. From safeguarding critical infrastructure to strengthening international partnerships, ARX Robotics is driving innovation where it matters most.

name: auctionata
description: auctionata was the leading online platform for art and luxury collectibles and one of the ten biggest auction houses (outside of China) with over 800.000 customers worldwide. The company attracted consignors, business partners and buyers with over 700 livestream auctions and an online shop with more than 25.000 objects from over 14 categories. As the inventor of the livestream auction, the company broadcasted auctions in real-time via desktop, mobile devices and mobile app.

name: Boku
description: Boku, the leading direct carrier billing mobile payments company, brings bank­‐grade payments technology and mobile users together, creating a trusted, accessible platform for consumers, merchants and operators alike. Based in San Francisco with offices in Europe, Latin America, and Asia, boku reaches more than 4 billion consumers worldwide, across 67 different countries with more than 250 operators. In 2014, boku acquired Mopay. In November 2017, Boku went public on London Stock Exchange’s Alternative Investment Market (AIM).

name: Caremondo
description: Caremondo is a global digital marketplace for medical tourism that enables patients to compare treatment offers and book appointments in clinics worldwide. Caremondo partners with renowned hospitals such as the Charité Berlin and the HELIOS Hospital Group. For patients, Caremondo is a service provider, that books clinic appointments and arranges additional services such as translations, interpreter services, and hotels. For clinics, Caremondo is an international online marketing partner that generates visibility and patient inquiries from patients worldwide. In 2016, Caremondo was sold to FairMedOnline.

With Dance, you get a state-of-the-art e-bike, without the hassle of buying and owning, and with all the services you need included. The longer term goal of Dance is to spark a global movement built on a connected community of passionate e-bike riders, ultimately transforming our cities to be more bike-friendly and livable.

name: Dealflo

Its suite of powerful, customisable modules caters for the most demanding clients and is geared towards increasing conversion, decreasing costs and enforcing compliance, all within a secure cloud based SaaS solution. In 2018, Dealflo was acquired by VASCO Data Security International Inc., which is now better known as OneSpan.

name: Enpal
description: Enpal is on a mission to become the energy supplier for the 21 century and has already become Germany's largest photovoltaic systems installers. Vis-a-vis its customers, Enpal offers its "zero-down" PV rental solution with customers paying a monthly rate that includes cost of installations, operations and maintenance. This simplicity turns PV rental into the no-brainer that it should be, paving the way for large-scale decarbonization of electryicity grids.

name: Entyre
description: At Entyre, we have made it our mission to improve patient care with technology. Missing transparency and high complexity within our health care system frequently lead to over- and undersupply for care-dependent people. Every year, this results in thousands of preventable hospitalizations and deaths. It takes a heavy toll on the healthcare system and on our society. By developing innovative technical solutions, we identify and correct the gap between what is currently administered, and what care-receivers need. Leveraging proprietary data, our algorithms enable patients, caring relatives, doctors, and insurances to take better decisions.

Missing transparency and high complexity within our health care system frequently lead to over- and undersupply for care-dependent people. Every year, this results in thousands of preventable hospitalizations and deaths. It takes a heavy toll on the healthcare system and on our society. By developing innovative technical solutions, we identify and correct the gap between what is currently administered, and what care-receivers need. Leveraging proprietary data, our algorithms enable patients, caring relatives, doctors, and insurances to take better decisions.

description: Mondoo is the world’s first agentic vulnerability management platform that eliminates - not just categorizes - vulnerabilities. name: TrustYou

The products are used by suppliers – hotels, accommodations, restaurants – for an array of reputation management purposes and by intermediaries – OTAs, meta-search, destination marketers – to help travelers purchase wisely. TrustYou enables hotels and destinations to provide travelers with better services and enhanced offerings by monitoring, surveying and acting on trusted feedback of their guests, and helps intermediaries to improve travelers’ search-shop-buy experiences by providing structured data like Meta-Reviews. In 2017, TrustYou was acquired by Recruit Holdings Co.

In 2010, Tutoria was acquired Macmillan Publishers.

It is trusted by millions of users worldwide, and won the Europas Award for Best Security/Privacy Startup of 2014. In 2018, Zenmate was acquired by Kape Technologies.

one_liner: Founded in Berlin in 2013, Contentful pioneered the API-first, headless CMS. Today, Contentful is the leading composable content platform that lets teams create, manage, and deliver digital content across websites, apps, and any channel via APIs.

one_liner: Hull was a real-time customer data platform that unified, synchronized, and enriched customer profiles across tools to power marketing and sales operations. The company was acquired by MessageBird.

description: SuperAnnotate is an end-to-end data platform for multimodal AI that unifies dataset creation, curation, labeling, and quality management with model evaluation and fine-tuning. Teams use it to accelerate computer vision and GenAI workflows, deliver better models, and manage data at scale.
one_liner: SuperAnnotate is an end-to-end data platform for multimodal AI that unifies dataset creation, curation, labeling, and quality management with model evaluation and fine-tuning. Teams use it to accelerate computer vision and GenAI workflows, deliver better models, and manage data at scale.

name: Tenderly
description: Tenderly is a full‑stack Web3 infrastructure and developer platform for EVM chains, combining high‑performance Node RPC and a Web3 Gateway with Virtual TestNets, transaction simulation, debugging, monitoring, and alerting to help teams build, ship, and scale dapps with end‑to‑end observability.
one_liner: Tenderly is a full‑stack Web3 infrastructure and developer platform for EVM chains, combining high‑performance Node RPC and a Web3 Gateway with Virtual TestNets, transaction simulation, debugging, monitoring, and alerting to help teams build, ship, and scale dapps with end‑to‑end observability.

name: Tengo
description: Tengo is an AI-powered platform that helps companies find, qualify, and respond to public tenders at scale. It centralizes opportunities, automates analysis and answer drafting, and streamlines collaboration from discovery to submission for faster, higher-quality bids.
one_liner: Tengo is an AI-powered platform that helps companies find, qualify, and respond to public tenders at scale. It centralizes opportunities, automates analysis and answer drafting, and streamlines collaboration from discovery to submission for faster, higher-quality bids.

name: Thalamed
description: Thalamed was a B2B marketplace that helped doctors, clinics, and hospitals find, compare, and purchase medical equipment by requesting quotes from leading manufacturers. Acquired in 2021.
one_liner: Thalamed was a B2B marketplace that helped doctors, clinics, and hospitals find, compare, and purchase medical equipment by requesting quotes from leading manufacturers. Acquired in 2021.

name: Storefront
description: Storefront, founded in 2014, is an online marketplace that makes offline retail accessible on demand by connecting brands with short-term retail spaces for pop-ups and experiential stores across major global cities. Acquired by PopUp Immo, a company specializing in short-term retail space rentals.
one_liner: Storefront, founded in 2014, is an online marketplace that makes offline retail accessible on demand by connecting brands with short-term retail spaces for pop-ups and experiential stores across major global cities. Acquired by PopUp Immo, a company specializing in short-term retail space rentals.

name: Tier
description: Founded in Berlin in 2018, Tier built a leading shared micromobility platform for e‑scooters and e‑bikes across Europe and beyond, focused on safe, sustainable urban transport. In 2024, Tier merged with Dott to create one of Europe’s largest operators.
one_liner: Founded in Berlin in 2018, Tier built a leading shared micromobility platform for e‑scooters and e‑bikes across Europe and beyond, focused on safe, sustainable urban transport. In 2024, Tier merged with Dott to create one of Europe’s largest operators.

name: TradeLink
description: TradeLink is a logistics collaboration platform that digitizes delivery coordination between warehouses, suppliers, and carriers – covering slot booking, dock and yard management, driver check-in, and load carrier tracking – to make inbound flows predictable, cut waiting times, and improve on-time performance.
one_liner: TradeLink is a logistics collaboration platform that digitizes delivery coordination between warehouses, suppliers, and carriers – covering slot booking, dock and yard management, driver check-in, and load carrier tracking – to make inbound flows predictable, cut waiting times, and improve on-time performance.

name: Tripaneer
description: Tripaneer is a leading marketplace for multi-day, themed travel experiences, spanning yoga and meditation retreats, surf camps, safaris, culinary vacations, and more. Founded in 2013 and based in Amsterdam, it helps travelers discover and safely book unforgettable trips worldwide.
one_liner: Tripaneer is a leading marketplace for multi-day, themed travel experiences, spanning yoga and meditation retreats, surf camps, safaris, culinary vacations, and more. Founded in 2013 and based in Amsterdam, it helps travelers discover and safely book unforgettable trips worldwide.

name: Duplo
description: Duplo builds the financial operating system for African enterprises – combining domestic and cross-border payments, vendor management, cards, and reporting in one platform.
one_liner: Duplo builds the financial operating system for African enterprises – combining domestic and cross-border payments, vendor management, cards, and reporting in one platform.

name: Mason
description: Mason was a feature-building platform that enabled product teams to design, build, and deploy front-end features together without full app releases. Positioned as “front-end as a service,” the company ceased operations in September 2019.
one_liner: Mason was a feature-building platform that enabled product teams to design, build, and deploy front-end features together without full app releases. Positioned as “front-end as a service,” the company ceased operations in September 2019.

name: Typeform
description: Typeform, founded in Barcelona in 2012, helps businesses collect insights and leads through beautifully designed, conversational forms, surveys, and quizzes. Today, Typeform has evolved into an AI-powered engagement platform, where users can build and edit interactive forms instantly using natural language prompts.
one_liner: Typeform, founded in Barcelona in 2012, helps businesses collect insights and leads through beautifully designed, conversational forms, surveys, and quizzes. Today, Typeform has evolved into an AI-powered engagement platform, where users can build and edit interactive forms instantly using natural language prompts.

name: Unamo
description: Founded in 2012 as Positionly and later rebranded to Unamo, the company provided an integrated platform for SEO ranking, on-page optimization, and social media monitoring to help teams manage and grow their online presence.
one_liner: Founded in 2012 as Positionly and later rebranded to Unamo, the company provided an integrated platform for SEO ranking, on-page optimization, and social media monitoring to help teams manage and grow their online presence.

name: Unbounce
description: Unbounce, founded in 2009 in Vancouver, was one of the first and leading platforms for building high-converting landing pages without code. Over time it expanded into a conversion intelligence platform, adding several AI tools to further boost performance and ROI.
one_liner: Unbounce, founded in 2009 in Vancouver, was one of the first and leading platforms for building high-converting landing pages without code. Over time it expanded into a conversion intelligence platform, adding several AI tools to further boost performance and ROI.

name: UpCodes
description: UpCodes is a comprehensive building-code compliance platform for architects, engineers, and contractors. Founded in 2016, it unifies searchable codes across jurisdictions, collaboration tools, and Copilot – an AI assistant that answers project-specific code questions with cited sections.
one_liner: UpCodes is a comprehensive building-code compliance platform for architects, engineers, and contractors. Founded in 2016, it unifies searchable codes across jurisdictions, collaboration tools, and Copilot – an AI assistant that answers project-specific code questions with cited sections.

name: Upciti
description: Paris-based Upciti provides urban intelligence via on‑device computer vision sensors and software that turn real‑time street activity into actionable metrics for traffic, infrastructure, and livability. Used by municipalities worldwide, Upciti processes data locally to protect citizens’ privacy.
one_liner: Paris-based Upciti provides urban intelligence via on‑device computer vision sensors and software that turn real‑time street activity into actionable metrics for traffic, infrastructure, and livability. Used by municipalities worldwide, Upciti processes data locally to protect citizens’ privacy.

name: Vend
description: Founded in Auckland in 2010, Vend built one of the first cloud POS systems for independent retailers, offering inventory, multi-store, loyalty, and real-time reporting. Backed early by Point Nine, Vend was acquired by Lightspeed in 2021, where its technology continues to power modern retail operations.
one_liner: Founded in Auckland in 2010, Vend built one of the first cloud POS systems for independent retailers, offering inventory, multi-store, loyalty, and real-time reporting. Backed early by Point Nine, Vend was acquired by Lightspeed in 2021, where its technology continues to power modern retail operations.

name: Vercept
description: Founded by world-class AI researchers in Seattle, Vercept is training a foundational model for how computers use computers. Its product, Vy, lets you command your machine with natural language, navigating apps, content, and context seamlessly.
one_liner: Founded by world-class AI researchers in Seattle, Vercept is training a foundational model for how computers use computers. Its product, Vy, lets you command your machine with natural language, navigating apps, content, and context seamlessly.

name: Whereby
description: Whereby provides secure, no-download video meetings and a developer-friendly video API used across telehealth, education, and customer support. Founded in Norway as appear.in in 2013 and rebranded in 2019, the company focuses on simplicity, customization, and privacy-first design.
one_liner: Whereby provides secure, no-download video meetings and a developer-friendly video API used across telehealth, education, and customer support. Founded in Norway as appear.in in 2013 and rebranded in 2019, the company focuses on simplicity, customization, and privacy-first design.

name: Wikifarmer
description: Wikifarmer is a global platform that empowers farmers with free, expert-led education and a B2B marketplace to sell directly to verified buyers. It promotes fair, transparent agri-food trade and traceability while helping buyers source quality, sustainably produced goods.
one_liner: Wikifarmer is a global platform that empowers farmers with free, expert-led education and a B2B marketplace to sell directly to verified buyers. It promotes fair, transparent agri-food trade and traceability while helping buyers source quality, sustainably produced goods.

name: Workerbase
description: Workerbase helps factories modernize operations with a no-code connected worker suite for digital work instructions, task management, alerts, and data capture – linking people, machines, and IT systems. Manufacturers use it to boost productivity, quality, and agility without rebuilding the shop floor.
one_liner: Workerbase helps factories modernize operations with a no-code connected worker suite for digital work instructions, task management, alerts, and data capture – linking people, machines, and IT systems. Manufacturers use it to boost productivity, quality, and agility without rebuilding the shop floor.

name: Xeneta
description: Xeneta is the leading ocean and air freight rate benchmarking and market intelligence platform, using crowdsourced data to deliver real-time pricing, capacity, and index insights that help shippers, forwarders, and carriers benchmark, plan, and negotiate better.
one_liner: Xeneta is the leading ocean and air freight rate benchmarking and market intelligence platform, using crowdsourced data to deliver real-time pricing, capacity, and index insights that help shippers, forwarders, and carriers benchmark, plan, and negotiate better.

name: Yogaia
description: Yogaia is an online wellness platform offering live and on-demand yoga, Pilates, strength, and mindfulness classes you can join from anywhere. Founded in Finland in 2013, it pioneered live, interactive sessions with optional camera-on feedback to bring studio energy home.
one_liner: Yogaia is an online wellness platform offering live and on-demand yoga, Pilates, strength, and mindfulness classes you can join from anywhere. Founded in Finland in 2013, it pioneered live, interactive sessions with optional camera-on feedback to bring studio energy home.

name: Zenaton
description: Zenaton was a developer-focused workflow orchestration platform that automated and supervised complex business processes, handling retries and powering event-driven background jobs with simple code across workers and queues.
one_liner: Zenaton was a developer-focused workflow orchestration platform that automated and supervised complex business processes, handling retries and powering event-driven background jobs with simple code across workers and queues.

name: Zendesk
description: Zendesk builds customer service and experience software used by businesses to support, engage, and retain customers across email, chat, messaging, voice, and AI. Founded in Copenhagen in 2007 and now headquartered in San Francisco, Zendesk went public in 2014 and was taken private in 2022.
one_liner: Zendesk builds customer service and experience software used by businesses to support, engage, and retain customers across email, chat, messaging, voice, and AI. Founded in Copenhagen in 2007 and now headquartered in San Francisco, Zendesk went public in 2014 and was taken private in 2022.

name: ZenML
description: ZenML is an open-source MLOps and LLMOps framework that helps teams build reproducible, production-ready ML pipelines across any stack. Its code-first, pipeline-centric approach integrates with popular tools, and a managed cloud adds collaboration, governance, and enterprise support.
one_liner: ZenML is an open-source MLOps and LLMOps framework that helps teams build reproducible, production-ready ML pipelines across any stack. Its code-first, pipeline-centric approach integrates with popular tools, and a managed cloud adds collaboration, governance, and enterprise support.

description: Zentist provides an AI-powered dental revenue cycle management platform focused on dental support organizations (DSOs) and multi-site dental practices in the US.

name: 10 Percent
description: The app gives consumers 10% cashback on their favorite brands, no matter where they shop. Behind the scenes, 10% powers a data-rich, brand-centric loyalty engine that helps FMCGs activate their audiences, predict churn and trends, innovate with real insights, and retake control. Brands even secure exclusive access to their category, locking out competitors for months. 10% is creating the default operating system for brand loyalty and consumer data.
one_liner: Building the infrastructure that lets FMCG brands own loyalty, data, and customer relationships, not the retailers.

name: Abhi
description: Founded in 2021, Abhi is building practical financial infrastructure for emerging markets. As a next-generation neobank, it provides Earned Wage Access and flexible SME financing that give workers and businesses quicker, more reliable access to liquidity. The model solves everyday cash-flow challenges and makes essential financial services easier to reach. Abhi also became the first MENAP-based startup to receive the World Economic Forum’s Technology Pioneer Award.
one_liner: Pakistan's first financial wellness platform focused on democratizing credit for both individuals and businesses.

name: Abwab.ai
description: Founded in Saudi Arabia, Abwab.ai is a fintech-powered AI platform that transforms SME lending through automated underwriting and credit decisioning. It enables banks and lenders across the MENA region to make near-instant, data-driven credit assessments, replacing slow manual underwriting processes. By automating loan origination, lead qualification and credit analysis, Abwab.ai reduces risk, cuts costs and accelerates the flow of capital to small and medium enterprises. The company’s mission is to bridge the vast financing gap facing SMEs – unlocking growth and inclusion through smarter, faster, and technology-driven lending.
one_liner: AI-driven fintech platform that automates SME lending and credit decisions for banks and lenders across the Middle East and Africa.

name: Actiondesk
description: Actiondesk (acquired by Data Dog in 2023) is a cloud-based spreadsheet application that integrates with live data sources, enabling users to access and join data from across the cloud stack. ‍ By automatically connecting data directly from user databases and other services, the need for CSV export operations are eliminated. Users can run common spreadsheet functions, including lookups or pivot tables, using the same methods available in other spreadsheet applications.
one_liner: Cloud spreadsheet connected to live data sources for analysis of real-time information.

name: Adverity
description: Adverity is an online marketing data analytics and reporting platform. Advertisers and marketing agencies use the platform to analyse real-time data from multiple popular marketing tools alongside offline data – such as Excel spreadsheets – to deliver insights into their marketing activities. Adverity efficiently compiles different data sources to help marketers take control of their marketing campaigns. ‍ Their products are web-based marketing intelligence and advanced analytics platforms that fully integrate input from several marketing tools into one application. This creates a united data stack for more efficient reporting, better decision making and improved marketing performance.
one_liner: Intelligent data platform transforming marketing data into actionable, performance-driving insights.

name: aerska
description: Dublin-based Aerska, with research operations in London, is leveraging advances in ‘brain shuttles’ to enable targeted delivery of next-generation RNAi therapeutics to the CNS. ‍ By silencing the genes that cause harm, Aerska aims to preserve the minds, protect the memories, and enable our loved ones to live longer, healthier lives.
one_liner: Pioneering RNA medicines to treat, delay, and prevent diseases of the brain.

name: Afilio
description: Afilio provides families with a centralized location to create and consolidate personal estate management, legal, financial, and retirement planning.
one_liner: Legal and financial protection for individuals and businesses.

name: Agro.Club
description: Agro.Club is digitizing the global agricultural value chain by connecting input suppliers, grain buyers, and farmers through a comprehensive digital ecosystem, aiming for greater transparency and efficiency in supply management. ‍ The platform offers essential digital services like e-commerce, grain procurement, and business intelligence. It also provides embedded financial solutions, including factoring and credit, directly within transactions, helping stabilize cash flow, expand capital access for agricultural partners, and simplifies complex supply chain interactions.
one_liner: Two-sided agricultural marketplace with embedded financial services.

name: Alinia AI
description: With Alinia AI, enterprises can evaluate, control and optimize Generative AI applications. We empower subject-matter experts to guide Large Language Models' output based on companies' policies and preferences. We bring the safety, transparency, and evidence that both Executive and ML teams need to confidently deploy Gen AI applications.
one_liner: Enabling the safe and controlled deployment of Generative AI, guided by companies´ policies and business preferences.

name: Amodo
description: Amodo (acquired by Cambridge Mobile Telematics in 2023) is a customer engagement and powerful analytics technology combined in one. ‍ Amodo enables insurance companies, digital brokers and adjacent industries to market new products and services and engage users through smartphones. As value for customers rise, insurance businesses thrive.
one_liner: Helping insurers place the right products with the right users at the right time.

name: Anda
description: Founded in Angola, Anda is an African mobility and fintech platform that empowers drivers to own their vehicles through an accessible drive-to-own model. It provides training, insurance, maintenance support, and safe operating hubs, helping transform informal transport work into stable, dignified livelihoods. With its growing electric vehicle fleet, Anda is also driving cleaner, more affordable, and more organized urban mobility. The company is reshaping the sector by combining financial inclusion, human-capital development, and sustainable innovation.
one_liner: African mobility platform empowering drivers to own their vehicles.

name: apiday
description: apiday’s purpose is to enable every company to be sustainability minded by helping them manage their ESG data as systematically and accurately as their financial data. ‍ With the apiday SaaS tool, companies gain control of their sustainability agenda, answer ESG data requests in moments, reduce reputational risks and unlock new opportunities. ‍
one_liner: Building the operating system of ESG data for forward-thinking companies.

name: Paradox
description: Paradox is building a new kind of organizational intelligence — one that addresses a simple but costly truth: most leaders have little real-time insight into what’s happening across their companies. ‍ Despite layers of tools, meetings, and reports, strategic clarity often breaks down as companies scale. Teams pull in different directions, decisions drift, and precious time is lost chasing alignment that never quite clicks. Ironically, the systems meant to bring order often add more complexity, not less. ‍ That’s the paradox being solved. Instead of stacking yet another tool on top, Paradox has developed an AI-powered reasoning layer that connects the dots across the business — surfacing hidden constraints, tracking strategic flow, and ensuring the right people get the right information at the right time.
one_liner: Replacing fragmented tools with an AI-powered platform that unifies organizational intelligence and enables aligned decision-making.

name: Asap.work
description: Asap.work is revolutionizing the future of work in the construction industry by connecting construction companies with qualified temporary workers through a digital-first offer with personalized support. At the same time, skilled workers on the platform are also able to quickly find new employment opportunities and better-paying jobs.
one_liner: Connecting construction companies with qualified temporary workers.

name: Astral Systems
description: Astral Systems' mission is to provide innovative, cutting-edge fusion technology that enhances access to critical medical isotopes, accelerates fusion research, and lays the groundwork for sustainable energy systems. Led by Talmon Firestone, CEO, and Dr. Tom Wallace-Smith, CTO; Astral Systems is currently focused on solving the growing crisis surrounding the international medical isotope shortage, which is severely impacting cancer diagnosis and treatments. Astral’s compact reactors' unparalleled performance means they are poised to produce enough neutrons to offer an evergreen supply of isotopes, curtailing global manufacturing shortages. ‍
one_liner: Pioneering transformative fusion technology to address real global health and energy challenges today.

name: Wikidocs
description: Wikidocs (acquired by Atlassian) was a real-time collaboration framework that turns any web page into a live, editable ‘docs’ service in minutes with the ability to build content, create, edit, and share – all at once. The solution saved users the hours of wait and back and forth communication waiting to receive the latest version with changes. ‍ Wikidocs offered this service through an API and a few lines of Javascript to be added to client websites.
one_liner: Turning web pages into live, editable “docs” services in minutes.

name: Autone
description: Autone is an end-to-end operational decision platform for the luxury and broader consumer goods industry. ‍ With their user-friendly platform, they provide customers with decision recommendations of their inventory, demand, supply planning, pricing elasticity, and analytics operations in a slick and collaborative manner.
one_liner: An end-to-end operational decision platform for the luxury and broader consumer goods industry.

name: avatao
description: Avatao is a hands-on secure coding learning platform used by developers, security champions, pentesters, security analysts, and DevOps teams around the world to improve their IT security knowledge, and to speed up secure product development. The Avatao platform offers more than 600 real-life tutorials and challenges in the most popular programming languages, covering the most crucial security topics, from secure DevOps via API security to cryptography. Whether you need to teach your developers the fundamentals in a security awareness training, provide them a continuous training based on career tracks or build a security champions program, Avatao is the right tool for you.
one_liner: Helping developers deliver high-quality products by immersing them in real-life scenarios of security best practices.

name: Bikemap
description: Bikemap is a platform where bike enthusiasts around the world create, upload and share their favorite cycle routes. The Bikemap app lets users record routes on the go, add their own photos or notes and share it all on social media. ‍ Bikemap has evolved to become the largest bike route collection in the world– with active users in more than 80 countries sharing their cycling experiences from all around the world. More than 1,500 new routes are created by Bikemap users on a every day; enriched with information such as route length and interactive elevation profile for every cycling route. To date, users have access to more than 3 million different routes.
one_liner: Create, upload, and share your favorite cycle routes.

name: Billie
description: Billie's mission is to simplify the purchasing experience for businesses by providing flexible payment terms, such as "Pay Later" or "Pay in 3 installments," directly at the point-of-sale for merchants. ‍ The platform uses big data analytics and fully digitalized processes to offer merchants real-time payment approval and 100% default and fraud risk protection, ensuring they are paid upfront while their buyers can defer payment. Billie is integrated with major payment providers like Stripe and Adyen and aims to unlock cross-border trade and provide short-term liquidity solutions for SMEs across Europe. ‍
one_liner: Offering merchants risk-free payment deferral options and flexible trade credit to their business customers.

name: Bindbridge
description: Bindbridge, the Cambridge-based Ag-biotech company, develops next-generation crop protection that shores up crop resilience and boosts food and agricultural outputs. Bindbridge’s revolutionary AI discovery tool enables the rational design of new agricultural compounds for targeted protein degradation, which are the building blocks of safer, more effective herbicides and next-gen crop protection agents.
one_liner: AI-based molecular discovery for agriculture.

name: Bitfount
description: Bitfount enables modellers to gather insights and train models from other people’s data. Because of the federated nature of the platform, Bitfount enables data providers to share the benefits of their data without ever having to give up control or privacy.
one_liner: A platform for federated AI and data collaboration.

name: Bitmovin
description: Bitmovin provides transcoding and media streaming solutions for developers and businesses. The company has developed the market's fastest API driven cloud-based video encoding service and an HTML5 Player that allows adaptive content to be played on any device, in any browser without buffering. Their API based products help developers around the world solve video problems with cloud-native software that runs anywhere. ‍ Since its founding in 2013, this Y Combinator alumni startup has created a portfolio of solutions for video streaming services that are used by companies like Periscope, RedBull Media House, The New York Times, and more for their adaptive video streaming and embedded video needs.
one_liner: Providing the video streaming infrastructure used by global media companies.

name: Bitpanda
description: Bitpanda is fully regulated and licensed investment platform, enabling both retail and institutional users to trade a wide variety of assets, including cryptocurrencies, fractionalized stocks, Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs), and precious metals. ‍ Bitpanda Technology Solutions (BTS) offers a modular, white-label API infrastructure, allowing established banks and other FinTechs to rapidly integrate compliant digital asset trading and custody services into their own customer applications.
one_liner: Europe’s leading platform for investing in crypto, stocks, ETFs and precious metals.

name: Blindmate
description: Dating apps promise connection but deliver isolation. Swiping alone through endless profiles only makes you lonelier. ‍ Blindmate lets your friends swipe for you, bringing the feeling of “we met through friends” online. The result is more than just a cure for loneliness; it creates a truly social dating environment with built-in virality.
one_liner: Lets your friends swipe for you, turning lonely swiping into a shared social experience.

name: bliq
description: Berlin-based Bliq lets its users maximize their earnings while driving more safely, while creating a safer, fairer, more sustainable gig economy.
one_liner: Empowering gig workers in the transport industry to manage their workflow across multiple platforms.

name: Saúde Bliss
description: Founded in Brazil, Saúde Bliss is an AI-powered insurance platform that streamlines how small and medium-sized businesses access, compare, and secure coverage. The platform automates the entire insurance workflow – from matching SMEs with the right products to generating instant quotes and issuing policies – removing the friction of traditional, manual processes. By integrating data-driven recommendations and seamless digital onboarding, Saúde Bliss helps insurers reach underserved segments while enabling SMEs to obtain affordable, transparent coverage in minutes.
one_liner: AI platform that simplifies and automates insurance for SMEs.

name: BLNG
description: BLNG empowers designers to create high-quality jewelry concepts in seconds, enables brands and retailers to offer immersive customization experiences, and provides digital merchandising solutions with photorealistic visual effects. ‍ By integrating generative AI into every stage of the jewelry creation process, BLNG accelerates design workflows, enhances personalization, and transforms how jewelry is showcased and sold online.
one_liner: End-to-end generative AI solution for jewelry design, customization, and digital merchandising.

name: Blocktorch
description: Blocktorch (acquired by third web in 2024) is the observability platform for the decentralized stack, covering all observability pillars to empower web3 developers to scale every decentralized component globally and serve billions of users reliably. We help builders to understand the behaviour of a decentralised application holistically, act quickly and become data driven. By enabling best in class observability practices, blocktorch is on the mission to make web3 mass-market ready.
one_liner: End-to-end observability platform for logs, metrics, and traces for decentralized applications.

name: Boltzbit
description: Foundation models are turbo-charging the future of AI , and it is happening right now. Built by top AI researchers, Boltzbit creates the first Foundation AI platform that allows its users to build multi-tasking continuous-learning AI from data without a single line of code. ‍ The solutions of Boltzbit AI have a wide range of use cases in financial services and digital marketing. The Boltzbit Foundation AI platform brings the open-source community, AI researchers, and AI solution builders together to push AI into the next level.
one_liner: Cost-effective and code-free foundation AI to empower businesses and developer communities.

name: Breathe Battery Technologies
description: Breathe Battery Technologies is a London-based startup and 2019 spin-out from Imperial College London founded by Dr. Yan Zhao, Dr. Ian Campbell and Professor Greg Offer. The company was founded in pursuit of universally clean air and a sustainable Earth. Today, Breathe is actively developing the technologies to improve battery safety, performance and cost to support the electrification of our planet’s transport systems. ‍ We create battery management software that provides deep insights into battery health. These insights are then used to improve the battery and to provide great software products to the automotive and consumer electronics markets.
one_liner: Building physics-based battery management software to support the electrification of our planet’s transport systems.

name: Metrilo
description: Metrilo (acquired by Brevo in 2021) is a suite of analytics and marketing tools for eCommerce websites. It helps merchants track key performance indicators (KPIs), analyze trends, and make data-driven decisions to increase retention, conversion and sales performance. Metrilo’s CRM platform also allows webshops to send highly targeted email campaigns and to measure their success rates. ‍ The company's software is easy to install and integrates with all major e-commerce platforms such as Woocommerce, Shopify, or Magento. As of January 2018 the company has hit over $100MM USD in total sales generated with their email automation and segmentation tools alone.
one_liner: Tailored to the needs of e-commerce websites.

name: Koalaboox
description: Koalaboox's (acquired by Cegid in 2020) e-invoicing Software as a Service helps SMEs simplify their daily invoicing and accounting processes through tracking of revenues, expenses and payments - offering a one-click invoice financing solution built into the platform, allowing clients to fund invoices and solve their working capital needs.
one_liner: Financing solution for SMEs, integrated into an easy-to-use e-invoicing software.

name: Celus
description: The AI-powered CELUS Engineering Platform generates schematics, PCB-Layouts and BOM at the touch of a button. ‍ By automating all the manual steps in the engineering process, reducing development times by up to 90%.
one_liner: Empowering development teams to easily build embedded systems.

name: Charles.co
description: Charles is a digital clinic that addresses chronic health issues in men, such as sexual health, hair loss, or insomnia. ‍ Based in France, the startup offers all its services via an integrated digital platform developed in close collaboration with prominent medical experts on men’s health.
one_liner: A digital clinic specializing in men’s health.

name: Cherrypick
description: The Cherrypick app turns the chore of grocery shopping into a delightful tech-driven experience by allowing users to complete their weekly shop in a few clicks. ‍ Users can easily set health goals, dietary requirements, choose recipes and plan meals for the week - Cherrypick then automatically fills up your shopping basket with the necessary ingredients and delivers them to your door.
one_liner: Do your weekly grocery shop in a fraction of the time.

name: ClauseMatch
description: Evolve with compliance. The award-winning ClauseMatch policy management, regulatory change management and compliance SaaS platform automates time-sucking tasks, organizes your data and makes collaboration and knowledge-sharing a breeze. ‍
one_liner: Real-time document editing and collaboration for highly regulated industries.

name: CoachHub
description: CoachHub is a Berlin-based global digital coaching platform built to provide personalized, measurable, and scalable talent development solutions for the entire enterprise workforce. The platform connects employees at all career levels with a worldwide network of over 3,500 certified business coaches across 90 countries and 80 languages via its proprietary mobile and web application. ‍ Blending human expertise and AI innovation, CoachHub uses an intelligent AI matching system to pair coachees with the most suitable certified coach. This dual approach, combining world-class human coaching with AI-driven personalization and the recently launched AI coach companion, AIMY™, democratizes access to professional development and drives measurable business outcomes across its 1,000+ enterprise clients. ‍
one_liner: Turnkey solution to transform your managers into highly effective, inspiring leaders.

name: Cobee
description: Cobee ( acquired by Pluxee in 2024 ) is an employee benefits company that is using new technologies to disrupt the big benefit market that has been traditionally dominated by big incumbent players. All our efforts are focused on making employees feel happy about their benefits, trying to unify the value proposition in an understandable and easy to use formula.
one_liner: Take control of your salary.

name: Colorful
description: Content creation is time-consuming and costly, while at the same time more content is needed than ever before. Colorful (acquired in 2023) solves this issue with the power of 3D. ‍ Insert the digital twin of your physical product into hundreds of pre-built scenes. Adjust the composition and get HQ results in no time thanks to cloud rendering. Export unlimited high-quality images and videos for all touchpoints: Website, social media, in-store, print, or TV. ‍
one_liner: Allowing brands to easily create photo-realistic visual content.

name: Complori
description: Complori (acquired in 2025) is an educational tech company dedicated to teaching digital programming to kids aged 7 to 16. It utilizes an adaptive learning platform to offer paid, cohort-based coding classes, supplemented by a mobile app with free, gamified, self-paced content. Since launching in 2020, Complori has taught over 17,000 children how to code, including 800+ from low-income households via B2B partnerships. The startup has earned recognition in the digital education industry, winning awards such as the Innovationspreis Berlin.
one_liner: An online learning platform teaching children 21st-century skills.

name: Complyance
description: Complyance centralizes risk and compliance data across the enterprise, replacing fragmented tools and manual processes with automated, end-to-end GRC workflows. The platform provides a single source of truth for controls, risks, evidence, and policies, improving transparency and coordination across teams. ‍ Intelligent, domain-specific agents support compliance teams by continuously reviewing evidence, assessing vendors, tracking risks, and identifying gaps before they escalate. This enables organizations to reduce manual effort, respond faster to audits, and maintain a real-time view of their compliance and risk posture at scale.
one_liner: Enterprise risk and compliance, automated with intelligent agents.

name: consola.finance
description: consola.finance (acquired by Request Finance in 2024) is on a mission to bring clarity and control to companies’ crypto finances with the first human-readable block(chain) explorer with dedicated finance, accounting, bookkeeping and reporting tooling. consola.finance automates crypto finance processes, saves valuable time, reduces human errors and gives companies the opportunity to make better decisions.
one_liner: The first end-to-end finance and accounting collaboration platform for web3 firms.

name: ContextSDK
description: ContextSDK collects more than 200 signals from the modern smartphone to assess a user’s real-world context instantly - whether they're commuting, walking, or relaxing - and use this for intent detection. This allows for the delivery of precisely timed, context-aware notifications and content that enhance user satisfaction and drive conversions. Its on-device processing ensures privacy by avoiding cloud transfers, which preserves user trust. ‍ ContextSDK’s vision is to establish real-world context data as the new gold standard in mobile app engagement, providing product owners and CMOs with a powerful tool to continuously optimize user experiences.
one_liner: Enhancing mobile app engagement and revenue by leveraging real-world user context with Machine Learning.

name: Conundrum
description: Conundrum helps industrial companies to leapfrog into Industry 4.0 by leveraging value hidden in data and introducing AI-driven technologies. ‍ The UK-based technology company's software helps industrial companies address the following: predictive maintenance, quality control and industrial processes optimization. Its software is based on its proprietary machine learning technologies for industrial time series analysis. ‍ ‍
one_liner: Industrial automation powered by AI.

name: Crate.io
description: The next wave of big data will be generated by IoT (Internet of Things) devices such as sensors, wearables, and vehicles, generating millions of data points per second. ‍ Crate.io was founded to help companies process this data and establish a standard for database developers with its decentralized SQL database for managing machine data and analyzing it in real time. Making traditional central databases obsolete and allowing companies to store their data on different application services, providing simplicity and scalability.
one_liner: Distributed SQL database for real-time industrial data and IoT applications.

name: Credi2
description: Credi2 develops and operates “Buy now, pay later” payment solutions (BNPL) for banks, financial service providers, trading companies and their end customers. ‍ An important success factor is the [credi2] technology platform, which can handle all processes fully automatically. With this platform individual and user-friendly financing solutions are implemented - together with customers such as Apple, Volkswagen Bank and Raiffeisen Bank International. The best known are cashpresso and FINANCE A BIKE. ‍
one_liner: BNPL for banks, financial service providers, trading companies, and their end customers.

name: Curve
description: Curve ( acquired by Lloyds Banking Group in 2025 ) helps people simplify their finances by connecting different debit and credit cards as well as accounts to one single card and smart app. The app serves as a dashboard where people can manage their different accounts as well as keep track of their spending habits. It’s the only card customers need to carry (and the only pin they need to remember!) ‍ Curve also helps address the privacy and security aspect of payments. The app automatically alerts users every time the card is used and gives people the ability to instantly lock the card from the app in case of fraudulent payments or loss as well as unlock it again later.
one_liner: One card. One app. Zero hassle.

name: Cyberwrite
description: Founded by cyber experts and actuaries – Cyberwrite delivers a cyber insurance underwriting solution for the growing SMB cyber insurance market. ‍ Cyberwrites helps insurers who lack the analytics technology and actuarial data needed for SMB and SME cyber underwriting. These insurers otherwise assume high risk services estimated to reach over $1T annually. ‍ Cyberwrite has offices in San Francisco and in Tel Aviv, and graduated from 500Startups, Plug and Play, and Citi Accelerator. The company is working with several large customers and is backed by SpeedInvest and prominent insurance and cyber security angel investors.
one_liner: Helping insurance companies manage their cyber-insurance underwriting business.

name: cylib
description: cylib aims to secure global raw material demands by recycling Li-ion batteries. This is realized by a proprietary, resource-efficient and environmentally friendly end-to-end process. The holistic cylib-process gives commodities another life by treating used batteries and transforming them into marketable raw materials. With cylib’s process, it is possible to recover all battery components. This also includes Lithium and Graphite among other materials that are currently not recovered from batteries in the EU. ‍ The recycling process was developed over many years of research at RWTH Aachen University and contains all the relevant process steps, like mechanical, thermal and chemical treatments to reach high yields.
one_liner: Sustainable technology for Li-ion battery recycling, for a true circular economy.

name: Deblock
description: Founded by former Revolut and Ledger executives, Deblock is Europe’s first fully on-chain banking solution, combining a regulated euro current account with a personal, self-custody crypto wallet. Regulated by the Banque de France as an Electronic Money Institution and licensed under MiCA by the AMF, Deblock meets the highest European financial standards. By merging traditional banking simplicity with Web3 infrastructure, Deblock lets users seamlessly manage payments, savings, and investments while maintaining full ownership of their funds. This unified platform enables access to everyday finance and decentralised services without compromising security or control.
one_liner: Deblock is Europe’s first on-chain current account, combining everyday banking with a self-custody crypto wallet.

name: Deep Render
description: Deep Render (acquired by InterDigital in 2025) is an AI company developing the next generation of image and video compression algorithms. Their proprietary and patented image-compression technology is at the forefront of machine learning research, providing a 10x improvement over the current industry standards. ‍ Deep Render´s vision is to combine the fields of Artificial Intelligence, Statistics and Information theory to unlock the fundamental limits of image and video compression. Their Biological compression approximates the neurological processes of the human eye through a non-linear, context-aware, learning-based approach, thereby creating a novel class of highly efficient compression algorithms. Moreover, while the traditional compression methods (HEIC; HEIF; AV1; VVC) have hit peak-innovation with significantly declining performance gains per iteration, Biological Compression technology is only starting.
one_liner: Using deep learning and quantum techniques to develop next-generation image and video codecs.

name: Dialpad
description: Dialpad is an AI-native cloud communications platform that unifies calls, messaging, video, and contact center operations in one system. With built-in real-time transcription, summaries, and analytics, it helps teams improve productivity and customer engagement at scale. In 2024, Dialpad joined our portfolio following its acquisition of Surfboard.
one_liner: The AI-powered platform for modern business communications.

name: Djust
description: DJUST is a modular B2B commerce platform that enables companies to streamline their sales operations and increase productivity across the organization. With advanced payment capabilities and an Agentic Commerce approach, DJUST is redefining how businesses design, manage, and automate their commercial interactions. ‍ The platform empowers leading distributors, retailers, and manufacturers to break down system silos, digitise manual processes, and unlock new growth opportunities. More than a flexible order management system, DJUST is a foundational layer that helps future-proof businesses through scalability and continuous innovation. ‍ Backed by a global partner network, DJUST combines technological expertise with a human touch, supported by a team of 50+ B2B digital commerce experts across Europe.
one_liner: Modular B2B commerce platform automating sales operations

name: Doccla
description: Doccla is pioneering the virtual ward technology needed to ease pressure on hospitals and other healthcare providers, by reinventing remote patient monitoring (RPM) with innovative medical monitoring solutions to deliver safe, effective care from the home. ‍ This helps hospitals alleviate the pressure on resources, enabling the early discharge of patients while remaining under the care of clinicians. Industry-leading patient compliance, together with fewer readmissions and lower costs, have direct effects on healthcare providers and patients who can be taken care of in the comfort of their homes.
one_liner: Building the next-gen virtual ward company.

name: Donnerstag.ai
description: Founded by fintech veterans Barbaros Özbugutu and Volkan Özkan, Donnerstag.ai is transforming how suppliers manage receivables through an AI-powered platform. It integrates delivery, billing, and banking data to detect discrepancies in real time and reconcile transactions automatically. This gives finance teams full visibility, reduces revenue leakage, and improves liquidity control. Built in Germany and designed for Europe’s supply chains, Donnerstag.ai brings automation to one of the most overlooked areas of financial operations. ‍
one_liner: AI-driven platform that helps suppliers automate receivables and spot discrepancies in real time.

name: drag&bot
description: drag&bot (acquired by KEBA in 2022) is an intuitive, web-based software platform for easy setup, programming and operation of industrial robots. With its graphical interface no prior robotics skills are needed to step your company into the era of automation. Their solution can be deployed across all relevant, industrial robotic systems and offers a high degree of flexibility, making industrial robots economical even for small production batches.
one_liner: Supporting production companies to cost-effectively automate with industrial robots.

name: Dronamics
description: Dronamics is reinventing the future of cargo shipping through drones. ‍ Specializing in middle-mile cargo logistics through unpiloted aircraft, Dronamics has developed the Black Swan, a proprietary, heavy-duty cargo drone designed to offer high-capacity, long-range air freight services. The Black Swan drone can carry up to 350 kg (770 lbs) across distances of up to 2,500 km (1,550 miles), which is significant for unpiloted air cargo. ‍ This capability allows Dronamics to undercut traditional air freight costs, making rapid delivery accessible to remote and underserved regions.
one_liner: Heavy-duty, long-range cargo drone capable of same-day deliveries across continents.

name: Ellipsus
description: Ellipsus is helping a new generation of writers create culture together. The writing tool—which combines the best of modern text editors with the granular version control championed by Git—aims to thread collaboration through every stage of writing, editing, and publishing. Founded in late 2022, Ellipsus is currently in private beta testing.
one_liner: Making it easy for anyone to write together.

name: Emmi AI
description: Emmi AI tackles previously unsolvable industrial engineering challenges by applying cutting-edge AI to physics-based simulations. The Austrian-based company dramatically accelerates complex simulations, reducing run times from days or weeks to seconds, enabling industries like aerospace and automotive to overcome critical bottlenecks and unlock unprecedented efficiency. ‍ Emmi AI's unique strength lies in its fusion of deep learning expertise and deep industrial understanding, validated by significant early customer contracts. With the vision to deliver the 'GPT moment' in physics AI, they are building intelligent, data-driven digital twins that learn and optimize in real time, paving the way for a new era of AI-enabled engineering.
one_liner: Revolutionizing industrial engineering with next-generation AI simulation technology.

name: Candis
description: Candis makes workflows intelligent using an artificial intelligence tool that helps companies automate repetitive bookkeeping processes such as categorizing different invoices. ‍ The software can collect and handle invoices automatically and make sure everybody is paid on time, saving 80% of manual work. CANDIS also offers a special service for tax accountants facilitating the collaboration with clients and automating certain processes.
one_liner: Helping SMEs automate bookkeeping and financial workflows using AI.

name: EstateGuru
description: Through a technology-enabled platform, EstateGuru connects borrowers and lenders and enables fast, transparent and cost-effective funding solutions.
one_liner: Cross-border platform for short-term property loans.

name: Eunice
description: Eunice is an AI fintech company solving B2B challenges in digital assets. Their first product is digital asset due diligence and monitoring to help financial institutions, regulators, and businesses navigate the complexities of the digital asset space. Powered by a proprietary knowledge base, Eunice’s platform enables token classification, risk analysis, and asset disclosure requirements. ‍ With a mission to bring transparency to the digital asset industry, Eunice builds products that drive regulatory clarity and operational efficiency, intending to accelerate the mainstream adoption of digital assets.
one_liner: Bridging data and action to empower the sustainable development of Web3 and Crypto.

name: EXA Finance
description: Incubated by Draper University and backed by prominent VCs, EXA Finance is the most advanced marketplace for NFTs and fungible tokens on Algorand. ‍ The platform offers a multitude of features such as assets bundle, NFT to NFT swap, auctions, offers, royalties, and peer-to-peer chat just to name a few. Users can now sell NFTs for any fungible token but also swap an NFT for multiple NFTs, opening a new range of possibilities.
one_liner: The most advanced marketplace for NFTs and fungible tokens on Algorand.

name: Exactly.ai
description: Unlike existing Gen AI platforms that aim to bypass human creativity with AI, exactly is purpose-built to allow artists to create and replicate more designs, more quickly, in their own unique style – and maintain full ownership and IP rights over everything they create. ‍ exactly enables artists to build and train their own Gen AI models based on their individual artistic practice and original designs, producing brilliant work at speed without compromise or constraint. Using exactly, artists can enhance their productivity and accomplish more, faster, and hone their craft thanks to the ability to make rapid, limitless iterations on any design. In just a short time since launch, exactly has nurtured a community of more than 30,000 users purely through word-of-mouth and they have ambitious plans to expand the offering further during 2024 and beyond.
one_liner: Creative design tool for professional artists to utilize AI to scale and market their work.

name: Factris
description: Factris provides asset based financing, mostly using outstanding invoices as collateral to improve client cash flow and working capital. ‍ The company works directly with businesses or via financial intermediaries or entrepreneurial brokers to deliver its services in a quick, friendly manner at the lowest cost.
one_liner: Working capital financing to businesses by using their outstanding invoices as collateral.

name: Fairlyne
description: Fairlyne is building the world’s 1 st resale-as-a-service platform for the travel industry, allowing travel brands to generate incremental revenue and deliver a seamless Resale experience to their customers. ‍
one_liner: Resale-as-a-Service platform for the travel industry.

name: FairMoney
description: FairMoney leverages big data to give access to credit to 2 billion people in emerging markets across the world. ‍ Consumers and businesses in these markets often suffer from missing access to credit. FairMoney uses advanced machine learning applied to smartphone data to build credit scores and distribute credit through any mobile application.
one_liner: Providing digital banking and instant loans to customers across Nigeria and India.

name: Fernride
description: Fernride (acquired by Quantum Systems in 2025) is a Munich-based ground autonomy platform that specializes in human-supervised autonomous trucking for critical infrastructure and defense logistics. ‍ The company retrofits existing vehicles, primarily terminal tractors and trucks, with AI, sensors, and software to automate repetitive cargo movements within industrial yards, container terminals, and manufacturing sites. ‍ Fernride also deploys its certified technology into European defense logistics, leveraging the same platform to enhance mission resilience and reduce human risk in military supply chains.
one_liner: Dual-use, human-assisted autonomous trucking for industrial logistics and European defense supply chains.

name: Fertifa
description: Having offered fertility clinical advice longer than anyone else in Europe, Fertifa now also provides clinical care advice and wellbeing support for all of women’s health including menopause; men’s reproductive health; and fertility and family-forming. Fertifa is the most inclusive and comprehensive benefits provider for reproductive, hormonal and sexual health, making it accessible for any individual, regardless of gender, sexual orientation, age or relationship status.
one_liner: Enabling companies, large and small, to put DEI and employee well-being into practice.

name: Fiat Republic
description: Fiat Republic is on a mission to democratize fiat access for the Web3 economy. Fiat access is a systemic problem for crypto platforms and therefore requires a systemic solution. With our developer-first API, you can easily access everything you need to deliver better fiat experiences to your users and treasury teams. We’re unlocking and aggregating an ever increasing number of fiat rails with local and global tier-1 banks. Fiat Republic is able to give crypto platforms reliable access to best-in-class fiat products, all via a single API. We have developed a compliance-first approach that minimises friction in the on-ramp and off-ramp fiat-crypto flows. Our technology is augmented by the Fiat Republic Consortium. We’re building a coalition of crypto platforms to create a united voice, enabling us to continually add tier-1 global and local banking partners and have a seat at the table with regulators, to shape and influence the future rules that govern the space.
one_liner: A purpose-built, fiat-as-a-service platform to solve fiat access challenges for crypto platforms.

name: Fifth Dimension AI
description: Fifth Dimension AI is transforming the property industry with its AI product, Ellie, the ultimate real estate professional. By tackling tedious, manual tasks, Ellie liberates people to focus on high-value work. Developed by a team with deep expertise across Real Estate, Fintech, and AI, Ellie transcends the role of a typical digital assistant. Her nuanced understanding of the sector's intricacies, coupled with 98.4% accuracy in data extraction, has driven impressive 43% efficiency gains for early adopters. ‍ With operations established in the UK and expansion underway in the US market, Fifth Dimension AI is redefining AI-human collaboration in real estate and beyond.
one_liner: Revolutionizing complex, repetitive, and document-heavy workflows with AI.

name: Finary
description: Finary is a wealth management platform that provides users with an all-in-one, real-time dashboard of their investments across all asset classes. ‍ Finary counts 10,000 banks and investment platforms in Europe and the US connected to its system and covers saving accounts, stocks, crypto, real estate, precious metals, and startup investments overviews. Features such as real-time performance analysis, calculation of hidden costs and automatic identification of new opportunities allow Finary to offer tailor-made asset management that, previously, was only reserved for the wealthy.
one_liner: Track all investments automatically and in real-time, regardless of the asset class.

name: FinCompare
description: FinCompare (acquired by VAD Beteiligungen GmbH in 2021) is a comparison platform for financing options aimed at small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) seeking funding starting at 10,000 €. ‍ Via the online platform, businesses can access a wide range of financing options. Companies can independently compare offers from over 200 well-known banks, fintechs, and financial services providers and close on the financing. In addition to the usual corporate loans, FinCompare offers alternative financing solutions such as factoring, and leasing.
one_liner: Helping SMEs find, compare, and close on the right financing solution.

name: Finres
description: finres is revolutionizing decision-making in rural economies. By analyzing past and current trends and extremes in climate using AI and science, the France-based team can accurately predict future climate trends in the wake of global warming and climate change. This information is shared with banks and international organizations, along with measures farmers can take to ensure that their crops, livestock, and livelihoods do not suffer. ‍ By breaking down the barriers between research and the private sector, Finres is building a bridge between finance and agricultural resilience. The company currently operates in 32 countries across 4 continents and has supported over 1.4 billion worth of investments, with an increase in productivity per hectare of up to 50%.
one_liner: Providing AI and science-based solutions for banks to optimize agricultural investments in the face of climate change.

name: Firsty
description: Free mobile data for the world. That's the mission of Firsty, a next-generation telecom provider reshaping how travelers, expats, and remote workers access mobile data across the globe. Firsty offers free eSIMs through their app for easy, one-click installation, saving time and hassle. Firsty Free gives you the essentials: WhatsApp, Email, Google Maps, and online calls. Users can also upgrade to Firsty Fast for higher speeds and access to all apps. ‍
one_liner: Offering eSIM-based no-cost essential connectivity and high-speed connectivity from €1 per day.

name: Five Lives
description: Five Lives builds engaging and accessible digital tools for the tracking and improvement of cognitive health. Their mobile app helps prevent and detect dementia years earlier and at a fraction of the cost of current methods, extending quality of life for millions of people through personalized lifestyle improvements. ‍ The Five Lives team is diverse and experienced with proven ability to build and scale world-leading mobile apps. The core team worked together previously at Peak (60M downloads, 5M monthly active users), is led by successful entrepreneurs and has close input from expert scientific advisors.
one_liner: Building digital tools for the tracking and improvement of cognitive health.

name: Flaviar
description: Born out of frustration of how inaccessible fine spirits are today, Flaviar offers its members unparalleled access, be it in the form of information on spirits and personalized recommendations, or in the liquid form, through their Tasting Boxes, private labels, exclusive bottling, and live experiences.
one_liner: D2C spirits club providing education, discovery, and access to the world of fine spirits.

name: Fleksy
description: Fleksy integrates a multitude of productivity, eCommerce and entertainment services directly into the keyboard. Since most users spend a lot of time in messaging apps, switching from application to application and can now use their time more efficiently. Fleksy lets you attach documents, photos, to-dos, create events, and even more while messaging – all within your keyboard. Discover an intuitive gesture system coupled with auto-correction in 65+ languages. Holder of the world’s record for the fastest keyboard, Fleksy makes typing on a mobile smartphone a breeze!
one_liner: 3rd party mobile keyboard with integrated social & productivity features.

name: Flexkeeping
description: Flexkeeping (acquired by Mews in 2025) is a complete software solution for hotel housekeeping and operations helping hospitality professionals save time and work more efficiently. Processes that previously required manual work, multiple phone calls, and paper reports can now be managed from one simple application improving how hotel staff communicates, delegates tasks, and manages processes. ‍ The company’s software solution saves hotels hundreds of man-hours per month, drastically reduces inventory loss, and boosts productivity. World-class hotels all over Europe like Le Meridien, Holiday Inn, and Radisson Blu have adopted Flexkeeping as their operations software of choice. ‍
one_liner: Hotel operations software empowering hospitality professionals to work more efficiently.

name: Flinn
description: Flinn's vision is to make high-quality health products accessible for everyone. The first major milestone on this journey is to enable medical device manufacturers to automate quality and regulatory processes. The go-to-market product sets the focus on the automation of post-market surveillance processes. This means automating the collection, evaluation, and reporting of relevant data through smart workflows, integrations, and the support of AI.
one_liner: Enabling MedTech companies to automate quality & regulatory processes to launch and operate products 10x more efficiently.

name: Flow48
description: By embedding in the customer’s payment gateway, Flow48 can offer businesses upfront lump-sum investment capital to invest in inventory or CAPEX and generate future revenues.
one_liner: Offering revenue-based financing to online and offline businesses.

name: Flowdesk
description: In a context of exponential growth of token issuers in the web3 space, Flowdesk is building an infrastructure to help them tackle their financial needs with a more transparent and controlled approach. ‍ Flowdesk has built a scalable infrastructure that connects crypto-exchanges to innovative products, such as Market-Making as a Service (MMaaS). MMaaS is radically different than traditional liquidity provisions where issuers fully own their liquidity and can control the strategy according to their needs. ‍ To support their vision of scalable and regulated market-making in crypto , Flowdesk offers banking-grade compliance and stringent procedures to guarantee they always work in the best interests of issuers.
one_liner: Allowing web3 token issuers to manage their liquidity actively through Market-Making as a Service.

name: ForTunes
description: ForTunes (acquired by Utopia Music in 2023) puts comprehensive Music Data Analytics at the fingertips of a new generation of music creators by collecting, fetching, and visualizing data and providing customers with insights that help them understand who is playlisting & uploading their music and how their audience is growing.
one_liner: Mobile music data analytics app for self-published artists and small labels.

name: forward earth
description: Decarbonization has become a crucial regulatory requirement for businesses globally, yet the vast majority of companies still do not have clear visibility into their environmental impact, especially deeper down the supply chain. ‍ forward earth has built a product that empowers businesses worldwide to become sustainable and compliant with little effort and cost. By embedding our AI-automated environmental management software into our partners’ software, forward earth will support millions of businesses in every aspect of their reporting lifecycle as they undertake their decarbonization journey in the years to come.
one_liner: Easy-to-use, AI-powered environmental management seamlessly integrated into existing compliance and supply chain software.

name: Friday Finance
description: Friday Finance (acquired by Pliant in 2023) is the next-generation financial operations platform for startups and SMEs that puts all bank accounts and financial data into one place and helps them streamline and automate mundane tasks. It provides real-time insights into a business's cash flows and offers finance professionals better workflows for bill payments, approvals and the month-end close.
one_liner: Business finance, simplified.

name: Fuse
description: With only one in six patients knowing their costs upfront, and providers losing up to 10% of revenue to insurer underpayments, healthcare financial inefficiency is widespread in the US, even though clinics spend over 20% of their budgets on billing and collections. ‍ Fuse uses AI to automate tedious tasks like checking portals and calling insurers, so patients get accurate cost estimates before treatment and clinics save time previously spent on manual estimates and bill explanations.
one_liner: Bringing price transparency to US healthcare.
