description: Spun out of ETH Zürich, Scalera is an AI-powered SaaS platform designed to transform the complex world of construction procurement. The technology automatically parses massive tender documents, aligns technical requirements with local industry standards, and streamlines supplier coordination, compressing labor-intensive bidding cycles from several days into just a few hours. ‍ By embedding artificial intelligence deep into the construction supply chain, Scalera is establishing itself as the digital procurement backbone for leading construction firms across Europe. ‍ Scalera’s mission is to provide the essential infrastructure layer that enables the physical world to be built faster, more transparently, and with greater efficiency.
one_liner: Automating construction tendering and procurement with AI.

name: Schüttflix
description: Schüttflix is the first digital marketplace and delivery platform for bulk construction supplies such as sand, crushed rock, and gravel. ‍ The Schüttflix app, which connects suppliers and truckers directly with customers in landscaping and the heavy construction industry, currently offers same day service and 4-hour delivery to its core market. As the supply market is extremely fragmented and non-transparent, Schüttflix is the first to provide easy online access to customers across Germany in one platform.
one_liner: Digital marketplace for bulk construction supplies.

name: Seafair
description: Empowering crews and crew departments to be more effective, using data, technology and on the ground operations across across the world.
one_liner: Helping shipping companies manage data and recruit seafarers.

name: Second Nature
description: Second Nature is a digital health program, proven to help people change their behaviors and reduce their risk to type 2 diabetes. It solves this issue by introducing a 6-week behavioral change program delivered digitally and supported by mentors and health tracking. ‍ Users receive a Second Nature smart scale and an activity tracker to track their health and outcomes. Additionally, they will be matched with a full-time coach, who will guide them through the prevention program and they learn how to prevent diabetes through Second Nature’s online education courses.
one_liner: Inspiring and supporting people to live free of any lifestyle disease.

name: Sense Street
description: Thanks to our heavily curated datasets, we deploy deep learning methods to train models of natural language as it manifests on trading desks. This has resulted in production grade software that can extract both explicit and latent counter-party trading intentions with unprecedented accuracy. ‍ Our software turns trading desk into data driven functions, unlocking next generation CRM tools while automating human centric elements in the life cycle of a trade.
one_liner: Creating statistical language systems that are conditioned on conversations taking place in the Capital Markets.

name: Seqera Labs
description: Seqera Labs is on a mission to simplify complex data analysis pipelines in the cloud, providing software that enables developers and data scientists to create and deploy data applications in any environment. Their core, open-source technology Nextflow transforms the building of massively scalable and distributed computing solutions, and empowers customers across pharma, genomics and biotech to break with the status quo of closed-platforms and custom scripts to embrace the Nextflow future of cloud.
one_liner: Simplifying complex data analysis pipelines in the cloud across pharma, genomics, and biotech.

name: Shapr3D
description: Shapr3D builds instinctive CAD tools, helping design and manufacturing teams complete complex tasks with speed and efficiency. Through their multi-platform structure, you can work flexibly across devices. ‍ A non-hierarchical toolset makes Shapr3D quickly accessible, so every team member can contribute to the workflow, boosting overall output. Download Shapr3D from the App Store, Microsoft Store, or our website.
one_liner: Quick iterative CAD for faster and better design decisions.

name: Shpock
description: Shpock (acquired in 2014) is a mobile marketplace that brings millions of private buyers and sellers together in categories that range from electronics and fashion to cars and property.
one_liner: One of Europe’s most popular shopping apps.

name: SILQ
description: Formed by the merger of leading regional platforms Sary and ShopUp, SILQ Group provides a fully integrated ecosystem, combining B2B e-commerce, end-to-end logistics, and embedded financial services through its SILQFi arm. This full-stack approach allows the company to manage trade, facilitate cross-border shipments, and process payments seamlessly, supporting over 600,000 businesses across its network. ‍ The company's core mission is to solve the critical barriers facing small retailers and merchants in emerging economies: highly fragmented supply chains and limited access to formal banking or working capital. By integrating financial products—such as financing and cash management—directly into the commerce and logistics flow, SILQ enables these businesses to overcome capital constraints, scale smarter, and transition from traditional trading to modern, digitized operations.
one_liner: Helping SMEs in emerging markets buy inventory, ship it, and get financing, all in one app.

name: Simbel
description: Simbel also integrates with SMBs’ existing HR stack and uses periodic performance reviews as a starting point for identifying individual learning and development needs. It makes learning and development simple to deliver, allowing SMBs to benefit from the most up-to-date training from the best providers, while helping HR teams streamline all their L&D ops and measure the impact of the training. ‍
one_liner: Helping HR teams run L&D operations seamlessly.

name: Skyfri
description: Skyfri provides owners of renewable energy plants with sophisticated software to increase revenues and reduce downtime in production. Its platform is built to automate operations, maintenance, and asset management.
one_liner: Making renewable energy intelligent.

name: Smiler
description: Smiler believes that valuable memories deserve to be captured in high quality. It’s our mission to achieve that on a global scale for everyone, everywhere. ‍ We are the world’s first on-the-spot photography marketplace that brings photographers and consumers together at tourist hotspots and other leisure locations. By being in the places where these memories are created, Smiler taps into the uncaptured potential of billions of photos, preserving something higher quality and very valuable to people all around the world.
one_liner: The world’s first on-the-spot photography marketplace.

name: SOC.OS
description: SOC.OS (acquired by Sophos in 2022) was born within the internal incubator of BAE Systems Applied Intelligence in late 2018 and spun-out as an independent company in June 2020. It is a SaaS product and can be thought of as an embedding an extra security analyst to the team, one who has the ability to remember every interconnected relationship between every alert produced from each security tool.
one_liner: Fundamentally re-imagining how security operations are conducted today.

name: Solvo.ai
description: Solvo.ai is on a mission to build a ”central cross-functional brain” suite of products that combine human expertise with practical AI to make supply chains of the future resilient, agile and self learning by design. Our first MVP has been tested on real data from one of the leading global logistics service providers, with a target of 1000+ pricing experts. Our story is all about real people, real problems, real solutions, and real value. ‍
one_liner: Optimizing supply chain networks and driving higher yields in logistics through human-machine collaboration.

name: Sona
description: Sona’s mission is to put technology in the hands of frontline staff that transforms how they manage their work and engage with their employer. Designed for the specific needs of modern frontline workplaces, Sona’s employee app combines powerful productivity tools with a sleek, simple and intuitive user experience. ‍ Features include live schedule view, absence management, instant messaging, and Open Shifts, an innovative shift booking platform matching shift vacancies with employees willing to take on more hours. Trailblazing organisations across health and social care, retail, and the third sector are revolutionising the way they manage, engage and retain their staff.
one_liner: Workforce management built for frontline workers.

name: SpAItial
description: SpAItial is pioneering Spatial Foundation Models (SFMs), a new AI paradigm that generates and reasons about the physics and appearance of real and imagined 3D environments. Unlike current 2D-based AI, SFMs operate natively in 3D space, enabling more human-like understanding. This technology can revolutionize industries by creating realistic virtual worlds (gaming, VR/AR), improving design (CAD), and enabling smarter robots. SpAItial's work bridges the gap between virtual and physical, creating AI that truly understands our 3D world.
one_liner: Developing Spatial Foundation Models (SFMs), a new AI that understands and generates 3D environments and their physics.

name: BlubBlub
description: Speech therapists still assign homework on sheets of paper, because the industry has not yet been digitized. BlubBlub decided to change this by introducing its video app, which triggers sounds and words recorded by children and for children, helping them to practice in their specific language to address their specific speech problem. ‍ BlubBlub connects children, therapists and parents on one platform to ensure everyone plays a role in each child's progress.
one_liner: Video modeling and gamified activities to help children improve their speech and language skills.

name: Stateless
description: Stateless was founded in 2016 with a vision to fundamentally re-think the architecture of network devices to meet today’s “as a service” demands. The company has developed first of its kind technology to allow network functions like firewalls and load balancers to be easily offered and consumed through the “as a service” model. Stateless' platform and network functions move networking infrastructures of all kinds into the cloud era, giving operators the flexibility and functionality today’s users badly need.
one_liner: Making complex network functions easy to manage, fast, and scalable.

name: Storyclash
description: Storyclash is a social media monitoring tool for publishers, giving them a real-time view of what kind of content is trending on the Internet by analyzing social media interactions like shares, comments, likes and other reactions. ‍ Publishers, brands and agencies are able to discover viral articles, watch competitors in real-time, and make data-driven decisions with Storyclash to get more website traffic, higher engagement, and optimize their marketing campaigns. ‍
one_liner: Optimizing marketing campaigns by monitoring the impact of content on social media in real time.

name: Stotles
description: Stotles was founded in 2019 with a mission to unlock the potential of business and government working better together, helping businesses get ahead in the £9 trillion (€10 trillion) global public sector market with its sales-enabling platform. ‍ Their platform organizes a massive amount of messy government data, surfaces tailored insights and gives teams workflow tools to find and shape opportunities earlier in the government buying cycle.
one_liner: Stotles helps businesses access the public sector market with a sales-enabling platform that surfaces opportunities before they come to market.

name: Sunlight
description: Sunlight helps companies grow an engaging learning culture by facilitating their team’s access to any book, event, or course in the world, allowing businesses to allocate each team member with a learning and development budget and improving learning engagement by 34%. ‍ Through Sunlight employers can approve requests from their employees on everything from books to courses and events, and only get charged for what they use, in one monthly invoice.
one_liner: Helping companies create a highly engaging learning culture.

name: SwipeGuide
description: SwipeGuide ( acquired by L2L in 2024 ) is the next-generation instruction software. It provides an intuitive way to create enhanced-reality work instructions in a matter of minutes. Machine operators and field service engineers visualize, standardize, and execute digital instructions on mobile devices.
one_liner: Standard-work procedure and knowledge management.

name: Sylvera
description: Sylvera combines state-of-the-art machine learning with geospatial data to transformationally improve the accuracy, regularity and cost of carbon offset monitoring.
one_liner: Scaling negative emissions by driving better standards in the carbon markets.

name: TalkJS
description: It takes an enormous effort to get custom messaging on a platform right. TalkJS solves this issue by introducing its one-line integration messaging service for any platform with peer-to-peer communication needs.
one_liner: Providing User-to-User Messaging as a Service.

name: Taxfix
description: Taxfix is a digital tax platform focused on simplifying personal income tax filing through intuitive, mobile-first technology. By combining automation, AI-driven guidance, and access to certified tax advisors, Taxfix helps individuals file accurately, maximize refunds, and reduce the complexity traditionally associated with tax compliance. Operating across multiple European markets, Taxfix is redefining how people interact with their taxes. In 2024, Taxfix joined our portfolio following its acquisition of TaxScouts.
one_liner: The intelligent platform for seamless personal tax filing.

name: TaxScouts
description: TaxScouts (aquired by Taxfix in 2024) simplifies tax assessment and filing. ‍ The company has built the automation required to calculate, assess and reliably file personal income tax for non-standard incomes including professional freelancers, landlords, high earners and more.
one_liner: Personal income tax autopilot enabling simplicity, automation, and speed.

name: Surfboard
description: Surfboard (exited in 2024) is a collaborative planning tool for customer support teams. It's shift planning, scheduling, and forecasting functionality allows support teams to make work more human by reducing burnout and increasing scheduling flexibility through a single source of truth connecting disparate systems in one place.
one_liner: A simpler, smarter and fairer collaborative team planning tool for customer support teams.

name: Telleroo
description: Marketplaces need a scalable banking solution for conducting a high amount of outgoing payments. With Telleroo, businesses can send instant bank transfers directly from their back-end through a fully compliant payment API.
one_liner: An API for outgoing payments.

name: tenyks
description: Tenyks is a University of Cambridge spin-out, inventing the way humanity interacts with AI to protect and delight. ‍ We are building an MLOps monitoring and validation platform that helps AI developers working with computer vision data to build more reliable software faster. Specifically, our platform helps ML developers understand what’s wrong with their software and fix it.
one_liner: Helping AI developers who work with computer vision data to build more reliable software faster.

name: text.cortex
description: Berlin-based TextCortex is devoted to helping businesses become more open, public and searchable by enabling the creation of AI-developed text for their products, advertisements, blogs and other forms of the written word. ‍ The result? Lower costs and reduced human scalability limitations associated with writing text that a machine can understand.
one_liner: Combining advanced NLG algorithms with proven marketing practices to create the best AI software for copywriting.

name: Jumba
description: Headquartered in Nairobi, Kenya, Jumba is a construction technology company that is simplifying construction in Africa. Through its B2B marketplace, Jumba connects hardware stores and construction sites to manufacturers of construction materials. ‍ Launched in April 2022, Jumba serves customers in 60% of Kenya’s regions. The company is layering financial services through its bank partners to provide buy now pay later options for its customers.
one_liner: B2B construction materials marketplace simplifying the supply chain in Africa.

name: The Lowdown
description: The Lowdown is a community based women's health review, advice and prescriptions platform. ‍ Starting with contraception, they are on a mission to put women in control of their reproductive health decisions through their unique dataset, digital tools and services.
one_liner: The UK’s leading reproductive and sexual health platform.

name: ThinkSono
description: ThinkSono has created the world’s first software to diagnose ‘deep vein thrombosis’ (DVT) at the point of care. ‍ DVT is caused by a blood clot in the leg and is responsible for 800,000 deaths in Europe and the USA. ThinkSono’s solution can diagnose DVT within one step at 30 times cheaper and 10 times faster than current solutions on the market.
one_liner: Advanced ultrasound diagnosis in the palm of your hand.

name: Tibo Energy
description: tibo energy supports commercial and industrial customers in their energy transition journey by providing SaaS solutions for simulating and controlling energy hubs and smart grids. Their technology enables businesses to effectively manage and coordinate energy consumption, generation, and storage, leading to substantial cost savings and reductions in emissions.
one_liner: Unlocking the power of smart grids with Energy Hub Software.

name: Tide
description: Tide is a leading UK-based fintech platform built specifically to simplify banking and financial administration for Small and Medium Enterprises (SMEs), freelancers, and sole traders. Operating entirely digitally, Tide provides its members with a dedicated business current account that is managed entirely through its proprietary mobile and web application. ‍ Beyond just standard transactions, Tide integrates core administrative features like invoicing, expense management, and receipt capture directly into the banking experience, turning the account into a comprehensive financial management hub for business owners. ‍
one_liner: SME challenger bank redefining business banking.

name: Timberhub
description: Despite its size, the timber industry still largely relies on slow, offline, and manual ways of doing business, leaving it vulnerable to supply shocks that make it difficult for manufacturers, wholesalers, and construction companies to source right-quality timber at sufficient quantities and reasonable prices. To counter this, Timberhub is digitizing the entire sawn timber procurement process with an end to end online marketplace for timber to support manufacturers and contractors in purchasing, transporting, and financing their raw materials. This marketplace also helps buyers to verify the origin of the timber traded on the platform, allowing them to make more ethical and sustainable purchases.
one_liner: Digitally connecting manufacturers and contractors with sawmills across Europe.

name: Timeular
description: Timeular empowers people to improve their time management to create more value for themselves and the people around them. Their patented 8-sided device enables knowledge workers to accurately measure time spent on different tasks with a simple flip. The complimentary Timeular software and mobile app aggregates all data and gives users insights into how they spend their time and suggests actionable advice how to boost productivity. The device blew past its €75,000 goal on Kickstarter, going on to raise €313,637 from over 3,000 backers. After beating Kickstarter the company rapidly grew to more than 30,000 units sold and raised funds from Speedinvest and Ruvento.
one_liner: Timeular helps knowledge workers to track, understand and improve how they spend their time at work.

name: Toqio
description: The Toqio platform empowers companies to quickly create and launch their own fully branded digital banking and finance solutions. This proprietary infrastructure provides the foundation clients need to rapidly bring new financial products to market without extensive development time. ‍ The solution is designed for maximum flexibility and rapid deployment, featuring both a Development Hub for incorporating other financial service providers and building unique, custom features, and the Toqio Marketplace. The Marketplace allows clients to instantly integrate pre-curated fintech modules from leading providers, with the added opportunity to share and monetize the modules they create themselves. ‍
one_liner: Helping companies create and launch their own fully branded banking or finance solutions.

name: TourRadar
description: TourRadar is the leading online marketplace for multi-day tours and organized adventures. The platform makes it easy for travelers to find, compare, and book thousands of vetted small-group trips and longer organized journeys worldwide. ‍ The company's unique value is aggregating over 50,000 tours from more than 2,500 global operators, including major brands and independent local providers. This consolidation centralizes a traditionally fragmented market, offering travelers choice and price comparison for complex booking needs.
one_liner: Online marketplace for multi-day tours and adventures.

name: Tower
description: Tower, the Berlin-based data infrastructure company, builds the ‘last mile’ platform for data engineers in the AI era. It enables teams to turn AI-generated and human-curated data pipelines into reliable, production-ready systems, unifying Python compute with storage based on open, Iceberg-based standards that keeps AI grounded in fresh, company-specific data.
one_liner: AI-native data infrastructure for reliable production deployment.

name: Tranched
description: Tranched, is the first Deep Tokenisation embedded securitisation platform directly connecting lenders to investors, allowing them to structure and manage a transaction in a fraction of the time and cost. Our platform provides better, quicker, and more efficient access to financing for lenders, and broader investment opportunities to investors.
one_liner: Automating complex securitisation transactions, reducing friction and costs.

name: trawa
description: With trawa, companies gain access to customized energy procurement that combines all available products, including power purchase agreements with solar and wind farms. This secures long-term energy procurement and promotes the expansion of renewable energy without government subsidies.To analyze load profiles, identify savings potential and create an optimized energy portfolio, trawa relies on an AI-based software solution. This can unlock potential in electricity procurement and deliver savings of up to 20 percent.
one_liner: Professionalizing and simplifying the procurement of electricity for energy-intensive companies.

name: tulipshare
description: Today, most retail investors take a passive approach to investing by investing in ETFs or working directly with an advisor. As a result, they may lose out on their chance to align their investment strategy with their views. ‍ We started Tulipshare with a simple idea: Empower retail investors to invest their money so as to promote ethical change. Through our platform, we enable retail investors to invest in activist campaigns to change publicly traded companies from the inside. We then unify their investing power with other like-minded investors and seek to make their voice heard by big business.
one_liner: An activist platform empowering retail investors to promote ethical change.

name: Tulyp
description: Tulyp enhances the value for small and medium-sized businesses by enabling faster, more secure international deal closings beyond traditional processes, mitigating risks in import-export transactions – such as counterparty and document fraud risks – and ensuring secure and transparent payment terms that protect both buyers and sellers. ‍ Tulyp also collaborates with global financing companies to alleviate cash flow problems, reducing financial risks and accelerating import-export transactions by providing a one-stop shop that consolidates all necessary services, streamlining the entire process for SMEs engaged in international trade.
one_liner: Digitizes and secures the entire trade finance process, making global markets more accessible to SMEs.

name: TurinTech
description: Turin Tech is enabling businesses to automatically build, optimize with multiple objectives and deploy models within days via their platform EvoML - the only platform that can optimize models at high speed and low latency, as well as embed code optimization for optimal performance without compromising accuracy or other business metrics.
one_liner: Automating the entire process of creating, deploying, and optimizing AI.

name: Tuum
description: Tuum's mission is to set banks free by enabling them to quickly and safely replace their legacy systems, reducing their maintenance costs, and unlocking new opportunities to adapt and prosper in the digital age. ‍ By employing a smart migration approach, Tuum aids banks in moving off their current systems, with clients typically going live within just seven months. Once operational, Tuum's system empowers banks to effortlessly launch new products and enter new market verticals. Providing more than just core functionality, Tuum allows banks to operate multiple business lines from a single system, including accounts, lending, payments, and cards. Beyond this, banks can expand their capabilities through access to a pre-configured ecosystem of partner solutions. Tuum also facilitates business transformation. Its Business Builder enables banks to precisely configure their operating, sourcing, and distribution models, launching unique models that capitalize on the digital revolution.
one_liner: Core Banking. Without Limits.

name: TWAICE
description: TWAICE delivers solutions based on digital twins to fleet operators, battery and electric vehicle manufacturers to reduce battery development and testing costs as well as to increase battery reliability and lifetime. ‍ Their solutions are built around the belief that it should be simple to test and operate complex technical systems like batteries while always having the appropriate knowledge available.
one_liner: Using digital twins for more sustainable and reliable mobility.

name: Ultimate
description: Ultimate empowers everyone to access the world of Decentralized Finance by providing a user-friendly “front door” to crypto trading, high-yield DeFi investing opportunities, NFT art & collectibles and other Web3 services, all bundled into an intuitive mobile application. The Ultimate product is a consumer-grade, non-custodial crypto wallet allowing people to easily track, discover, invest in, and store a wide variety of on-chain assets. Our thesis is that the super apps of tomorrow will be non-custodial DeFi wallets that have the potential to contain your entire digital identity.
one_liner: Bringing Decentralized Finance to everyday investors around the world.

name: Unweave
description: Unweave gives developers instant access to the infrastructure they need to train their machine learning models with almost zero setup. It lets users run their machine learning code on GPUs with a single command without having to setup any custom cloud infrastructure. Our goal is to wrap the power of the cloud within the UX of your laptop. We want to turn every developer’s laptop into a supercomputer. ‍
one_liner: Giving developers instant access to serverless infrastructure for machine learning.

name: Drop
description: Borrowing from text marketing’s incredible reach, and email’s high acquisition powers, Drop allows brands to leverage Instagram direct messages at scale, for the first time, with impactful results like decreased cost-per-acquisition (CPA), increased return-on-ad-spend (ROAS), and ultimately, revenue. Drop has helped a spectrum of brands and retailers like Ana Luisa, Culture Kings, PANGAIA and Hot Topic in this new journey from follower to customer. From the next-gen, hypergrowth DTC brands to the well-established names, they’ve all experienced a decrease in acquisition costs and boost in growth. Drop’s momentum reveals the eCommerce industry’s shift towards social, headless (not on traditional site) shopping experiences.
one_liner: Helping brands maximize their social commerce potential.

name: Palm
description: Palm is a financial technology company created to streamline cash management for enterprise treasury teams. Built with enterprise-grade security and controls, the company’s Treasury Operating System provides corporate treasurers with the data and advisory to quickly understand and free up operational cash and automate workflows for forecasting and cash positioning.
one_liner: Enabling treasury teams to strategically move money between hundreds of bank accounts and local subsidiaries.

name: Usersnap
description: Usersnap (acquired by saas.group in 2023) is a visual bug tracking and feedback tool. The software lets users screenshot and annotate their current browser view facilitating communication and the flow of feedback between developers, customers and everyone involved in a web project. Usersnap integrates with existing project management tools, bug tracking systems as well as popular web platforms such as Wordpress. Among their customers are large technology companies including Google, Facebook, Microsoft and Netflix.
one_liner: Visual bug tracking and feedback tool.

name: Vocca AI
description: Vocca’s AI receptionist answers, books, and handles patient calls 24/7, eliminating hold times and freeing up staff for in-person care. The platform automates appointment scheduling, reminders, and patient queries, resolving over 80% of requests—directly in medical software or CRM. With the ability to manage 100+ simultaneous calls, securely log every conversation, and engage patients seamlessly across phone, SMS, and WhatsApp, Vocca addresses high call volumes, appointment no-shows, and staff overload. The result is faster service, happier patients, and clinics that run more efficiently and cost-effectively.
one_liner: Automating patient calls for healthcare providers with AI-powered assistants.

name: Wasmer
description: With Wasmer, enterprises can run ultra-lightweight containerized software with blazing-fast startup times, at near-native speeds anywhere — be it on servers, edge, and IoT devices or in serverless environments. ‍ It brings a vastly improved and simpler to use API, massive performance improvements, support for Apple Silicon, a pluggable infrastructure for easy customization, and support for “Headless Wasmer” a new ultra-lightweight runtime that is ideal for IoT.
one_liner: Making WebAssembly accessible to developers and enterprises.

name: Wayflyer
description: The dedicated growth engine for ambitious e-commerce and Direct-to-Consumer (DTC) brands globally. Wayflyer pioneered revenue-based financing (RBF), a fast, flexible alternative to traditional loans or equity sales. Fund and optimzing growth, the platform provides proprietary analytics and benchmarking tools that give brands critical insights into cash flow and ad spend performance, ensuring every dollar is invested where it will generate the maximum return, turning working capital into a true competitive advantage. ‍
one_liner: Revenue-based financing for e-commerce brands.

name: wefox
description: wefox connects customers with various insurance companies and licensed brokers, using technology to streamline everything from policy shopping to claims processing for products like car, health, and household coverage ‍ By blending digital tools with real, human advice from digitally-supported brokers, wefox is making insurance approachable and accessible for all. ‍
one_liner: Making insurance simpler.

name: Wikifolio
description: Wikifolio is an online platform that allows day traders to publish their portfolios for other traders to access and invest. Investment bankers and hobby-traders alike can use this app to connect and evolve. ‍ The “wikifolios” turn portfolios created on the platform into fully-fledged financial products which are then listed on the stock exchange Börse Stuttgart. Each trade, including execution price and fees, is updated in real-time on Wikifolio and partner sites to give the user clarity over the movements in the market. Some of Wikifolio’s certificates have been consecutively included in the top 10 most-traded products in their category of the Stuttgart Stock Exchange (EUWAX) in 2017.
one_liner: Allowing day traders and asset managers to publish their portfolios for other traders to access and invest in.

name: YardLink
description: Plant and Tool Hire Made Easy. YardLink is taking the hassle out of hiring equipment. YardLink aggregates supply and optimizes distance to the closest rental. Guaranteed reliability of service and availability of the equipment.
one_liner: Construction equipment rental B2B marketplace.

name: Yokoy
description: Experiencing the pain of manually preparing, tracking, checking, approving and processing expenses first-hand, the five co-founders of Yokoy, Dr. Devis Lussi, Lars Mangelsdorf, Melanie Gabriel, Philippe Sahli and Thomas Inhelder, set out to start an expense revolution. ‍ Zurich-based Yokoy ( acquired by TravelPerk in 2025 ) automates spend management for medium and large enterprises with artificial intelligence, combining expense management, supplier invoice management and smart corporate cards into one single intuitive platform.
one_liner: The all-in-one spend management platform.
